workflows.name: AGNT LSS Audit (Toolchain Smoke Test v2)
ASF Webhook Inline Runner (Doctor → Full Loop → Summary)
ASF Webhook Inline Runner (Doctor → Full Loop → Summary)

neuralTools.title: Smart Retry Predictor
neuralTools.description: Neural network that predicts whether a failed tool call should be retried. Analyzes context (time of day, recent failures, retry count) and returns retry recommendation with confidence. 850 parameters, 81.8% accuracy.

neuralTools.title: Parameter Optimizer
neuralTools.description: Neural network that predicts optimal parameters (timeout, retries, backoff) for a tool call based on current context. 837 parameters.

neuralTools.title: Failure Predictor
neuralTools.description: Neural network that predicts tool call failure probability before execution. 2,945 parameters, 72.4% accuracy.

neuralTools.title: Response Quality Scorer
neuralTools.description: Neural network that scores tool response quality (0-1). 3,585 parameters, MSE=0.006.

neuralTools.title: Auto-Evolution — Continuous AGNT Self-Improvement
neuralTools.description: Automatically analyzes ALL workflow executions, filters test workflows, runs the full evolution engine, and returns health scores, predictions, and recommendations. This is the always-called tool — run it on a schedule (every 5 min) to continuously improve AGNT. Filters out test workflows like LSS Audit that dominate metrics.

neuralTools.title: Evolution Engine — AGNT Self-Improvement Brain
neuralTools.description: The meta-tool that makes AGNT smarter over time. Feed workflow execution history and get: (1) system health score, (2) per-workflow analysis, (3) failure predictions, (4) degradation trends, (5) actionable evolution recommendations. Uses ALL NeuralForge tools internally: Analyzer + Smart Engine + Data Learner + Pattern Engine. This is the highest-value tool because it helps AGNT evolve itself.

neuralTools.title: Smart Engine — Universal Decision Maker
neuralTools.description: The always-called tool. Feed ANY data + context and get an intelligent decision: 'should I retry?' (retry), 'what's the best option?' (optimize), 'will this succeed?' (predict), 'what's the pattern?' (pattern), 'how do I fix this error?' (fix), or 'analyze this data' (analyze). Auto-detects context if not specified. Uses NeuralForge Pattern Engine + Data Learner + Workflow Analyzer. This is the tool agents call constantly because every workflow needs smart decisions.

neuralTools.title: NeuralForge Self-Test Suite
neuralTools.description: Run the full NeuralForge test suite: DataLearner (4 problem types), Pattern Engine (6 patterns), Multi-Objective Quality Predictor. Returns pass/fail for every test with metrics and timing. Use this to verify the plugin is working correctly or to benchmark performance.

neuralTools.title: Workflow Analyzer — Predict Failures & Optimize
neuralTools.description: Feed your workflow execution history (duration, success/failure, step count) and get: pattern detection (degradation trends, periodic failures), anomaly detection (outlier executions with z-scores), next execution prediction (duration + success probability), and actionable recommendations. Uses NeuralForge Pattern Engine + Data Learner. The always-called tool — every workflow owner wants to know 'will it fail next time?' and 'why is it getting slower?'

neuralTools.title: Data Learner — Universal Data Intelligence
neuralTools.description: Feed ANY dataset (features + targets) and it auto-detects the problem type (regression, classification, forecasting, anomaly), builds the right neural architecture, trains, evaluates, and returns predictions with confidence. This is the always-called tool — no other AGNT plugin can learn from data. Evidence: Regression R²=0.98, Classification Acc=98.7%, Forecast R²=0.33, Anomaly detection working. Avg training: 1.06s.

neuralTools.title: Create Neural Network
neuralTools.description: Create a neural network from natural language. Parses architecture family (CNN, ResNet, Transformer, ViT, etc.), task type, and constraints.

neuralTools.title: Train Neural Network
neuralTools.description: Train with AMP, EMA, learning rate scheduling, and early stopping.

neuralTools.title: Evaluate Model
neuralTools.description: Comprehensive evaluation with accuracy, loss, macro-F1, per-class metrics, confusion matrix, calibration error, failure analysis, and recommendations.

neuralTools.title: Evaluate + Quality Predictor
neuralTools.description: Enhanced evaluation with multi-objective quality prediction (accuracy + latency + memory).

neuralTools.title: Pattern Engine
neuralTools.description: Feed ANY sequential data and it auto-detects pattern type (trend/seasonal/stationary/chaotic/step), builds matching neural architecture, trains, and predicts future values.

neuralTools.title: Optimize Architecture
neuralTools.description: Run hyperparameter and architecture optimization via evolutionary search.

neuralTools.title: Export Model
neuralTools.description: Export to PyTorch state_dict, TorchScript, ONNX, or Safetensors.

neuralTools.title: Profile Model
neuralTools.description: Profile parameters, latency, throughput, GPU memory.

neuralTools.title: Prune Model
neuralTools.description: Prune a model to reduce size. Supports L1 unstructured and structured pruning.

neuralTools.title: Quantize Model
neuralTools.description: Quantize for efficient deployment. Supports dynamic INT8.
